h13a954fbgf8acg4229g987cg5dafebbda2c4: *As you lean in, something shifts beneath the dead man's features.*
ha29d7e1bg67ecg41c5g8b02g9e368f5a5011: *A glistening tadpole emerges, slithering up past a sightless eyeball.*
h4f6b597dg6a11g4cfcgabcdg0c07127f07cb: *The same as the creature behind your eye.*
h00201544g01a4g419agb5e8g31516320de33: *One squeeze should do it... but you stop short.*
h9936e05fg1f35g4268g91e5gedb90e243f55: *How could you think of harming something so beautiful, so pure?*
h842e0fd1g389cg4459gb461gcc95682ec560: Resist those feelings. This is a parasite!
h5cbdd30bg0333g4f7bgb433g918cee2220fe: *The tadpole plops to the ground. Now is your chance to stomp it into the dirt.*
hd2ef9301gd0c4g496eg9bd6g7663716fcf04: *But it's too precious. Too sweet. Isn't it?*
h12f89770gf6b1g4ef3gbf9cg200298689093: Concentrate and destroy it in one swift movement.
hcbcb88fcg1249g4701gab69gae9175677b99: *You raise your heel and crush the parasite into the ground. Intense regret washes over you, churning your stomach.*
h4d663fa6g157dg4c2bg8d4ag9a9365ac98bb: *Your foot trembles. You can't do it. You couldn't possibly.*
h8721349bga844g49d9g997egbc28183dbbc8: Strain every fibre of your being and smash the parasite.
h9e823d16geea9g432dg84edg3d670b0f5df9: Focus. Whatever is in your mind, it isn't you.
h90bcdcbeg9fa1g4e71ga879g1cbf84a2ea2b: *Intention zips from your mind to your heel. You crush the tadpole into the ground and fight off the well of sorrow swelling in your chest.*
hca2b4bf6g8e02g408ega237g83bfe50636df: *Your foot stops short. You want to destroy it, but you simply can't.*
hf3dbd83fgf1a5g47c0gafbeg876b04a03dbe: *No use. Your mind is not your own. For reasons you can't explain, you want it to live.*
h7f1c79d6g578cg4d17gabebgbf28d973bf4c: *It slithers away and vanishes into the undergrowth. Safe. Free.*
h82f9d063g36c9g469bga8eag90f60d190ac1: *It slinks away, worming into the forest undergrowth.*
h21296971gdcf5g4cf5g84eeg0665ce4df090: *It seems to curl upwards in recognition...*
he0bb507bg4d50g4086g8496g5d8de5f68538: *... then shrinks back down, eager to escape.*
ha87d4281g28dag4c78g8797g0b83bad8a762: *The tadpole slips out of its host and worms away into the undergrowth.*
hf3966ba1g7842g484dgb660gbc473336918c: *The man is dead, but something shifts beneath his features.*
